name: Golden Crab Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crusts from bread and cut slices into cubes.
2. Beat eggs, milk, and seasonings together in a bowl.
3. Stir in bread cubes, cheese, and crab until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9" X 13" baking dish.
5. Bake uncovered at 325°F for 1 hour or until the center is set.
6. Optionally, substitute 2 cups of shrimp (or a combination of shrimp and crab totaling 2 cups) for the crabmeat.
